content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape with IT sector under severe pressure (HCLTECH -10.5%, INFY -4.3% pre-results), but pharma, FMCG, PSU banks, and power showing broad strength. Book is already 74% deployed with 9 positions and an ADANIPOWER BUY still open from earlier — priority is position management, not new entries. INFY Q4 result today post-market is a binary event that could swing broader market tomorrow.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print (+35% PAT YoY), NIM 3.95%, HDFC Sec BUY TP 90. Stock pulled back from intraday high of 79.84 but thesis intact. Setting SL at 74.50 (below recent swing low ~72.31) and target 88 near broker TP. R:R ~1.9:1 from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4: GNPA below 1% for first time, ICICI Sec upgrade to BUY TP 1350. Stock +9.35% today on strong volume. Trail SL to 935 (below Apr 20 low) and target 1100 (conservative below 52w high 1141). R:R ~1.3:1 but thesis strong."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF as macro hedge remains valid with elevated VIX (18.73) and geopolitical overhang. Minor pullback today is profit-taking, not thesis break. SL at 119.50 below SMA20, target 135 for continuation."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.4% in the green, at fresh 52w highs with Nabha acquisition tailwind. Trail SL up to 1605 (near breakeven, below today's low 1645 with buffer) to lock in gains. Target 1850 below consensus 2000-2300 range to be realistic."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1520.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 with 18% volume growth, but entry was at post-result peak so currently flat. Rich 70-80x P/E limits upside. SL 1360 (below today's low 1382 with modest buffer), target 1520. Defensive FMCG leadership intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 25 (2 days) — binary event risk. Strong provisional business update (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). SL at 995 (below today's low with buffer) is tight to protect capital into earnings. Target 1140 on upside beat."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "new_target": 760.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high, strong momentum. Q4 results Apr 29 (6 days) — near-term binary event. ICICI Direct TP 770. SL 648 below Apr 17 low, target 760 below TP. R:R attractive into earnings with strong setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Breakout on FMCG defensive rotation, Nestle's beat raises bar. Q4 Apr 30. SL at 2290 (below today's low with buffer), target 2520 for modest continuation. Rich valuation limits upside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high zone, power sector leadership intact, peak summer demand tailwind. Q4 May 15. SL 388 below recent consolidation, target 435 below broker TP range 400-460."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "new_stop_loss": 0,
      "new_target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CANCEL the open BUY LIMIT @ 214 placed 26 hours ago. Adding ADANIPOWER would create a power-cluster concentration (TORNTPOWER + NTPC already held = 3 power names). Per sector/cluster discipline, one cluster expression is enough. Book is already 74% deployed. Cancel this stale order rather than let it fill at stale price."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact post strong Q4. SL below swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 935.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in gains as stock +9% on result; SL below Apr 20 swing low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.50,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge; minor pullback not thesis break."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; trail SL to protect ~INR 2700 of profit buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "reasoning": "Entry at post-result peak; tight SL to limit downside given rich valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Earnings Apr 25 — tight SL to manage event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 648.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong momentum into Apr 29 earnings; SL below prior consolidation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "FMCG rotation theme; SL below breakout zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Power sector leadership; SL below recent consolidation zone."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUROPHARMA, DRREDDY, CIPLA, MANKIND — pharma strong but already have GRANULES exposure; no new pharma add today. ADANIPOWER, ADANIENSOL — power cluster already concentrated, skip. ELECON +18.88% gap — avoid chasing, goodwill impairment in Q4. TRITURBINE — 15x volume spike with flat price, unclear, stay out. INFY result tonight is the macro swing. AXISBANK — await Q4 this week. HCLTECH — post-crash, wait for base before considering contrarian entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 74% deployed with 9 positions — at the upper bound of comfortable deployment. Priority today is (1) establishing SL/target on all 9 positions (critical risk-management gap — all showing SL=0), (2) cancelling stale ADANIPOWER order to free up capital and avoid power-cluster overconcentration (would make it 3 power names). No new entries justified given deployment level, binary INFY event tonight, and elevated VIX (18.73). Remaining INR 64k deployable is kept dry for post-INFY clarity. Cluster check: Financial services (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~INR 325k = 33% of capital — near the 35% sector cap, do NOT add more financials. Power (TORNTPOWER + NTPC) ~INR 110k = 11%, managed. FMCG (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR) ~INR 167k = 17%."
}
